pi_items.source: Explicitly requested in task.json description as maximumDistance = 2.5 (degrees).
Explicitly requested in task.json description as maximumTimeDifference = 60.0 (seconds).
Explicitly requested in task.json description as delayTimeSpan = 15 (seconds).
Explicitly requested in task.json description as magTypes = mww, Mwp, Mw, ML, mb, which verifier.py correctly parses into lowercase.
Explicitly referenced in task.json description, setup_task.sh, and task_utils.sh where SEISCOMP_ROOT is defined as /home/ga/seiscomp.

privileged_info_summary: The task explicitly requires the agent to configure the SeisComP scevent module by setting maximumDistance to 2.5, maximumTimeDifference to 60.0, delayTimeSpan to 15, and magTypes to mww, Mwp, Mw, ML, mb in the config file /home/ga/seiscomp/etc/scevent.cfg. All metadata claims exactly match the values specified in the task prompt.
